summary: Frontend testing completed for SnapRoad app after import path fixes. Verified all navigation flows work correctly - Welcome screen loads, Get Started -> SignUp, I already have account -> Login, Login with User/Partner/Admin tabs, Sign In -> Map screen, Bottom navigation tabs (Map/Gems/Family/Profile), and Admin Portal access.
critical_code_review_comments: Import path fixes successfully applied - auth components now correctly import GradientButton from '../../primitives/'
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
Navigation flows work seamlessly between all screens
Bottom navigation tab switching works correctly across all 4 tabs
Admin portal accessible from Welcome screen Business & Admin Access section
seed_data_creation: None - ALL DATA IS MOCKED in components
context_for_next_testing_agent: Import path fixes verified working. All navigation flows pass: Welcome->SignUp, Welcome->Login, Login->Map, Bottom nav tabs (Map/Gems/Family/Profile), Admin Portal access. Key test IDs: welcome-get-started-btn, welcome-login-btn, welcome-admin-portal-btn, login-as-user/partner/admin, login-submit-btn, bottom-nav-map/gems/family/profile. ALL DATA IS MOCKED - no real backend API integration.
mocked_data_note: ALL DATA IN FIGMA UI COMPONENTS IS MOCKED - no real backend API integration for authentication or data persistence.

features_tested.login_navigation: PASS - 'I already have an account' button navigates to Login screen
features_tested.login_tabs: PASS - Login form has User/Partner/Admin tabs that are all clickable

features_tested.map_screen_elements: PASS - Map screen shows search input, menu button, quick locations, nearby offers

features_tested.gems_tab_navigation: PASS - Gems tab switches to Gems screen
features_tested.family_tab_navigation: PASS - Family tab switches to Family screen
